# clo_network_loadbalancers (Data Source)

Fetches the list of load balancers in the project

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clo_network_loadbalancers" "all" {
  project_id = "1e8ff0f7-0b8c-4ec5-a0a4-e30cea0db287"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) ID of the project that owns load balancers

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `result` (List of Object) The object that holds the results (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `addresses` (List of String)
- `algorithm` (String)
- `created_in` (String)
- `healthmonitor` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--result--healthmonitor))
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `rules_count` (Number)
- `session_persistence` (Boolean)
- `status` (String)
- `switch_status` (String)
- `updated_in` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--result--healthmonitor"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.healthmonitor`

Read-Only:

- `delay` (Number)
- `expected_codes` (String)
- `http_method` (String)
- `max_retries` (Number)
- `timeout` (Number)
- `type` (String)
- `url_path` (String)
